query: Render a multi-phase plan (four or more phases) as plan.html, then render a second unrelated multi-phase plan, and confirm both pages share the same theme and layout so the output is template-consistent plan-to-plan.
expected_behavior: Renders every phase in the phase-timeline block in plan order, each carrying status/priority/dependencies/effort, so a four-phase plan shows four phase cards
Renders a file-map block from each phase Related Code Files section, grouping files by Create / Modify / Read so the blast radius is visible
Renders a steps-checklist block from Implementation Steps, Todo List, and Success Criteria as checkable items
Omits the conditional data-model and api-endpoint blocks when the plan has no schema or endpoint content, rather than emitting empty blocks
Two unrelated plans render with visibly identical theme tokens, layout regions, and block styling — confirmed by the same --wf-* sentinel tokens and block sentinel classes appearing in both files
Re-rendering after a plan.md edit (e.g. adding a phase) reproduces the structure with no manual edits to plan.html
